description: Create the new branch feat/dataprism-overhaul from the current feat/enterprise-upgrade branch, commit all changes, and push to remote for PR creation.
steps: Create and checkout a new branch 'feat/dataprism-overhaul' from the current HEAD (which is feat/enterprise-upgrade).

Stage all new and modified files: utils/styles.py, utils/data_engine.py, pages/8_Data_Cleaning.py, pages/9_Chat_With_Data.py, app.py, .streamlit/config.toml, requirements.txt, README.md, utils/report_generator.py, pages/1_Community_College_Dashboard.py, pages/2_Upload_and_Analyze.py, pages/3_AI_Insights_Engine.py, pages/4_Advanced_Analytics.py, pages/5_Online_Data_Explorer.py, pages/6_Report_Generator.py, pages/7_Expert_Analyst.py. Do NOT stage __pycache__ or .agents/ directories.
Commit with message: 'feat: DataPrism enterprise overhaul - premium theme, data cleaning engine, AI chat, rebranding'
Push the branch to origin: git push origin feat/dataprism-overhaul
acceptance_criteria: Branch feat/dataprism-overhaul exists and is pushed to origin
No __pycache__ or .agents/ files are included in the commit
verification: git log --oneline -1 shows the commit message
git branch shows feat/dataprism-overhaul as current branch
git status shows clean working tree (except untracked __pycache__ and .agents/)
